title: Restrict upstream asset downloads to the configured Inbucket origin
notes: Prevent SSRF through imported attachment or raw message download URLs

title: Force safe download headers for raw and attachment responses
notes: Always download as attachment and add nosniff on binary delivery

title: Add request body size limits to Axum and the Next proxy
notes: Reject oversized JSON payloads before they consume excessive memory

title: Add baseline browser security headers in Next.js
notes: Ship CSP plus standard anti-clickjacking and anti-MIME-sniffing headers

title: Move admin session handling to HttpOnly cookie or BFF-only auth
notes: Console JWT now stays in a Next-managed HttpOnly cookie and /api/mail injects auth server-side while redacting sessionToken from login/setup responses

title: Make console sessions revocable after password or recovery changes
notes: Console JWTs now carry a server-validated session version so password and recovery resets invalidate older sessions immediately

title: Add login and recovery rate limiting
notes: Protect /admin/login /admin/recover and /token with fixed-window IP and IP+identity throttling

title: Add OTP attempt caps and IP-scoped send throttling
notes: OTP codes now expire after repeated wrong attempts and send endpoints enforce IP-scoped fixed-window throttling

title: Gate or disable public /metrics by default
notes: Current metrics endpoint is public and touches the store on every scrape

title: Add SSE connection quotas and abuse protections
notes: /events now enforces a config-driven global SSE connection ceiling and releases slots on early disconnects

title: Reduce contention from the global AppStore mutex
notes: AppStore now internalizes backend-specific concurrency and background jobs share a lightweight scheduling gate instead of serializing every request on one outer mutex

title: Back OTP storage with shared persistence
notes: OTP codes now persist only as hashed records in the shared PostgreSQL otp_codes table so restarts and multi-instance deploys keep working

title: Remove side effects from GET /admin/access-key
notes: GET now returns existing access-key metadata only and no longer mints a new plaintext secret on read

title: Harden Linux Do OAuth with callback allowlisting and stricter validation
notes: Redirect URIs must match the configured callback allowlist or current admin origin and Linux Do URLs now reject credentials plus insecure non-local http

title: Enforce strong JWT secrets instead of relying on weak placeholders
notes: Config startup now rejects placeholder or too-short JWT secrets unless TMPMAIL_ALLOW_INSECURE_DEV_SECRETS is explicitly enabled for local development

title: Limit TMPMAIL_ADMIN_PASSWORD to explicit bootstrap or dev flows
notes: TMPMAIL_ADMIN_PASSWORD is now gated by TMPMAIL_ADMIN_PASSWORD_MODE so bootstrap is safe by default and force reset requires an explicit opt-in

title: Raise password policy and pin Argon2 parameters
notes: Mailbox and console passwords now require 10 characters and password hashing uses pinned Argon2id parameters instead of implicit defaults

title: Run containers as non-root with tighter runtime permissions
notes: API and frontend runtime images now default to non-root users and compose adds no-new-privileges read-only rootfs tmpfs /tmp and dropped Linux capabilities

title: Patch vulnerable and floating frontend dependencies
notes: Frontend latest dependencies are pinned to verified versions and a lodash override clears the prior npm audit vulnerability chain

title: Improve deployment defaults for PostgreSQL credentials and exposure
notes: PostgreSQL compose defaults now bind to localhost and require an explicit strong password instead of shipping weak public-facing defaults
